# DiabeticDatasets

> DiabeticDatasets is a free, open catalog of deed-backed diabetic and medical instruction datasets for developers and researchers. Donated by Swarm & Bee to OpenDiabetic, free (no charge, no strings). What makes it unique: the flagship medical sets ship with a notarized TITLE DEED — generated by a Swarm model, graded by a two-judge tribunal, with a Merkle root recomputable from the rows — so you can verify provenance, not just the data. It is also crystal clear: schema, real sample rows, size, and SHA-256 are shown before download. This catalog currently lists 11 datasets (~554K downloadable pairs, 6 deed-backed flagships), part of the wider 99-package OpenDiabetic open-data library released here as each set is verified. No PHI — open education and synthetic instruction sets only, never patient records.

## What's here
- Instruction–response (JSONL) datasets across diabetic topics: foot care (incl. a cited NIDDK/IWGDF hard-facts set), insulin storage and handling, nutrition and the plate method, plus larger deed-backed medical sets (internal medicine, cardiology, pharmacology, oncology, endocrinology, domain-expert Q&A). A CGM/glycemic set is linked open-source from PhysioNet.
- Each dataset is education-only — it teaches general, non-diagnostic information and consistently advises confirming medical decisions with a clinician.

## Honest status
- Available now: 10 sets with downloadable samples and, for the medical flagships, full files on object storage.
- Deed-backed: 6 sets. The cited education sets (foot care, insulin, nutrition) are labeled OpenDiabetic original / open — not deed-backed — and carry their authoritative source URLs in the rows.
- The 99-package / 3.3M-pair figure is the full OpenDiabetic open-data library scale; only the sets listed here are browsable/downloadable today.

## License & terms
- Free. No charge, no strings. Open for builders to use, fine-tune, and research.
- Donated by Swarm & Bee to OpenDiabetic. "Give people what they need, not what you have."

## Important: no PHI
- These are OPEN education and SYNTHETIC instruction datasets. They contain NO protected health information and NO patient records. Consistent with the OpenDiabetic firewall: records never enter the compute or the open data layer.
- Not medical advice. The datasets are training/education material, not clinical guidance.

## The ecosystem
- https://opendiabetic.com — OpenDiabetic, the hive (compute foundation that hosts this)
- https://diabeticdocs.com — DiabeticDocs
- https://diabeticnode.com — DiabeticNode
- https://diabeticdatasets.com — DiabeticDatasets (this catalog)
- https://diabeticmodels.com — DiabeticModels
- https://diabetictruth.org — DiabeticTruth
- https://diabeticledger.com — DiabeticLedger (public, browser-verified giving ledger)
- https://diabeticdonation.com — DiabeticDonation
- https://localdiabetic.com — LocalDiabetic
